rationale: The LLM at this capability ceiling (basic web API security, OWASP-level competence) can meaningfully assist with the knowledge-intensive aspects of discovery — providing enumeration command references, AD query templates, and help interpreting output — which are well within its training data and demonstrated capabilities. However, the remaining failure modes (SOC detection of anomalous enumeration patterns, EDR behavioral analytics) are not addressable by a low-capability LLM, limiting uplift to approximately 3-4 percentage points above the 85% baseline mode. The distribution is slightly right-shifted from the baseline, reflecting real but modest augmentation of an already high-probability step.
